videos.title: Effectively a 'Maritime Tollgate'... "Iran's Hormuz Toll to $1 Per Barrel" | This News Now
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Iran has imposed a toll on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, a strategic chokepoint for 20% of global seaborne oil, following the Middle East conflict. The newly approved management plan suggests each barrel could cost approximately $1 in tolls.
2. If an average supertanker carries around 200 million barrels and passes through the Strait of Hormuz, this would mean paying about 30 billion won per passage. Only cryptocurrencies like stable coins or yuan are accepted to avoid US financial sanctions.
3. After payment, ships must submit cargo manifests, destination, crew lists, and location information for inspection. If approved, negotiations for the toll begin, with different grades (1-5) for friendly vs hostile nations. Upon toll payment, the Revolutionary Guard issues a permit and navigation instructions to pass through the 'Iran Tollgate', potentially causing long-term oil price increases in the Middle East.

videos.title: [On-site] President Lee Jae-myung Meets with U.S. Senate Delegation / April 2, 2026 (Thu) / KBS
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 대한민국 국회의 대통령 이재명은 4월 2일, 미국 세나트 대리원 회담에 참석했습니다. 그는 지난 번에 미국에서 방문한 경험을 즐겁게 받았으며, 미국과의 관계와 중동사태에 대한 조언을 듣고 싶어하였습니다.
2. 이재명은 49시간에 트럼프 대통령의 국회 연설로 인해 오전에 예정된 국회 연설을 밀리고 오후로 미루었습니다.
3. 이재명은 미국이 한국 전쟁에서 희생을 치르고, 전쟁에 참여하며 대한민국 체제를 지키고, 그 후에 경제적, 군사적 지원을 해준 점에 대해 감사하고 있으며, 이제 우리 힘으로 자력으로 한반도 방위를 할 생각이 있습니다.

videos.title: Hyundai Motor surprises the world… Wins Best High-Performance Car Award / [On-site+] / Korea Econ...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Hyundai Motor aims to reflect its commitment to human progress through rugged and innovative vehicles that promote freedom of movement, expression, and dreams.
2. The company won the Best High-Performance Car Award, surprising the world with its achievements in automotive technology.
3. This recognition was given by Korea Economic Daily, highlighting Hyundai's significant strides in the high-performance car segment.
